{{Infobox group
| name = Eternity
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity]] specializes in creating and augmenting monsters.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity]] is an organization with a headquarters.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]] is an organization [[Ziel]] intends to destroy.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
